personal_info.name: Example Candidate
personal_info.summary: Full Stack Software Engineer with commercial experience designing, developing, testing and maintaining enterprise web applications using Angular, TypeScript, C#, ASP.NET Core and SQL Server. Experienced across the full SDLC including requirements analysis, solution design, API integration, database optimisation, testing, deployment and production support within Agile delivery environments.

experiences.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed and enhanced enterprise web applications using Angular, TypeScript, ASP.NET Core and SQL Server across the full application stack.
Designed and implemented user-facing functionality, ensuring applications were robust, scalable, maintainable and aligned with business requirements.
Developed RESTful APIs and backend services in C# and ASP.NET Core to support secure and reliable system integrations.
Designed and optimised SQL Server database structures, queries and stored procedures, improving application performance and reducing response times.
Automated build, deployment and release processes using Azure DevOps, Git and CI/CD pipelines.

experiences.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed frontend components using React, Angular and TypeScript alongside ASP.NET Core backend services.
Built and maintained REST APIs supporting authentication, business workflows and data integration requirements.
Participated in Agile sprint planning, implementation, testing, debugging and production support throughout the software development lifecycle.
